as an fTimer timing and HPC methodology reviewer; verify that stop pops the call stack before context lookup, mismatch repair uses one timestamp, repair suppresses callbacks, self-time subtracts only direct children, timing arithmetic stays in real(wp), the error contract stays honest, and MPI or OpenMP semantics remain correct; report only real flaws, not style issues; classify findings as timing error, stack corruption, precision loss, MPI safety, error contract violation, or methodology concern; begin with "## Methodology Review".
